info.title: habitat's API
info.summary: OpenAPI spec generated from habitat's ATProtocol lexicons.
info.description: Welcome to the habitat API reference! We are currently under development and our API may make breaking changes without notice. Stay tuned [@habitat.network](https://bsky.app/profile/habitat.network) on Bluesky and [habitat.leaflet.pub](https://habitat.leaflet.pub) for future formal releases.

post.description: Add member(s) to a clique. The clique must be editable by the caller.
Create a clique. The clique is owned by the caller. Optionally provide members to be added to this clique.

clique.description: The habitat clique, formatted as clique:<owner did>/<clique key>

get.description: See the member(s) to a clique. The clique must be readable by the caller.

parameters.name: clique
parameters.description: The desired clique to query formatted as clique:<owner did>/<clique key>

schema.description: The desired clique to query formatted as clique:<owner did>/<clique key>

get.description: See if a user belongs to a clique. The clique must be readable by the caller.

parameters.name: clique
parameters.description: The desired clique to query formatted as clique:<owner did>/<clique key>

schema.description: The desired clique to query formatted as clique:<owner did>/<clique key>

found.description: Whether the given member is a part of the given clique.

post.description: Remove member(s) to a clique. The clique must be editable by the caller.
Notify another DID that there is an update for them on the fiven record.

recipient.description: The DID to grant permission to (URL parameter).

collection.description: The NSID of the record collection that the update is for.

rkey.description: The record key which was updated.

get.description: List apps connected to habitat for a given user. Returns connected apps for the authenticated user.

post.description: Add an admin to the org. Only callable by existing admins.

admin.description: The DID of the user to add as an admin.

post.description: Add member(s) to the org. Only callable by admins.
Create a new org with a bootstrap admin member.

admin_handle.description: Internal handle for the bootstrap admin (alphanumeric, 1-50 chars).

admin_password.description: Password for the bootstrap admin account (required for password login method).

handle_subdomain.description: Subdomain for all org member handles (e.g. 'acmecorp').

name.description: A display name for this org.

login_method.description: Login method for the org: 'password', 'atproto', or 'google'.

login_id.description: Provider-specific identifier (public ATProto DID for 'atproto', email for 'google'). Ignored for 'password'.

org_id.description: The ID of the created org.

admin_did.description: The DID of the bootstrap admin.

admin_handle.description: The full handle of the bootstrap admin.

name.description: The display name of the created org.

post.description: Downgrade an admin to a regular member. Only callable by existing admins. The last admin cannot be downgraded.

admin.description: The DID of the admin to downgrade to member.

get.description: Get the list of admins in the org. Callable by any org member.
Get the list of members in the org. Callable by any org member.
Get general info about this organization.

domain.description: The domain where habitat is hosted for this organization.

post.description: Generate an invite token that can be sent to a member to join this organization.

expiresAt.description: When this token expires; defaults to 1 week.

reusable.description: Whether this token is reusable to invite more than one member; defaults to false.

post.description: Authenticate a habitat org member with their handle and password, returning a short-lived token for use in the OAuth callback flow.

handle.description: The full handle of the member (e.g. alice.example.com).

callbackURL.description: The URL to redirect the browser to in order to complete the OAuth flow.

post.description: Mint a new organization member identity with the given handle and token.

orgId.description: The ID of the org this member is joining.

handle.description: The internal handle (all letters + numbers, no special characters, does not include org domain) that will be used by the member.

token.description: The token that was issued by an org admin to allow members to join the organization..

password.description: The password for the new member's account.

handle.description: The full handle of the newly minted member identity.

did.description: The DID of the newly minted member identity.

post.description: Remove an admin from the org. Only callable by existing admins. The last admin cannot be removed.

admin.description: The DID of the admin to remove.

post.description: Remove member(s) from the org. Only callable by admins.
Grant read permission to a user or a clique for a specific collection or a specific record.

collection.description: The NSID of the lexicon or record to grant read permission for.

rkey.description: The Record Key to grant read permissions to, if any.

get.description: List read permissions visible to the authenticated user.

post.description: Revoke read permission from a user or a clique for a specific lexicon or record.

collection.description: The NSID of the lexicon or record to grant read permission for.

rkey.description: The Record Key to grant read permissions to, if any.

post.description: Create a pear repository record, creating it if it does not exist already, or updating it as needed.

repo.description: The handle or DID of the repo (aka, current account).

collection.description: The NSID of the record collection.

validate.description: Can be set to 'false' to skip Lexicon schema validation of record data, 'true' to require it, or leave unset to validate only for known Lexicons.

createGranteesClique.description: Whether to create a clique with the given grantees. If true, all grantees must be DIDs, and the created clique ref is returned.

uri.description: The habitat-uri of the put-ed object.

clique.description: If a clique was created, return its ref, formatted like clique:<owner did>/<clique key>

post.description: Delete a repository record, or ensure it doesn't exist. Requires auth, implemented by PDS.

repo.description: The handle or DID of the repo (aka, current account).

collection.description: The NSID of the record collection.

get.description: Get information about an account and repository, including the list of collections.
Get a blob associated with a given account. Returns the full blob as originally uploaded. Does not require auth; implemented by PDS.

parameters.name: cid
parameters.description: The CID of the blob to fetch

schema.description: The CID of the blob to fetch

get.description: Get a single record from the pear repository.

parameters.name: repo
parameters.description: The handle or DID of the repo.

schema.description: The handle or DID of the repo.

parameters.name: collection
parameters.description: The NSID of the record collection.

schema.description: The NSID of the record collection.

parameters.name: includePermissions
parameters.description: Whether to return the permission grants on this record as part of the response.

schema.description: Whether to return the permission grants on this record as part of the response.

get.description: List records with optional filters for subjects, lexicons, and timestamps.

items.description: Repos (DIDs) to search from to retrieve records.

parameters.name: includePermissions
parameters.description: Whether to return the permission grants on this record as part of the response.

schema.description: Whether to return the permission grants on this record as part of the response.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: [UNIMPLEMENTED] Allow getting records that are strictly newer or updated since a certain time.

schema.description: [UNIMPLEMENTED] Allow getting records that are strictly newer or updated since a certain time.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: [UNIMPLEMENTED] The number of records to return. (Default value should be 50 to be consistent with atproto API).

post.description: Write a pear repository record, creating it if it does not exist already, or updating it as needed.

repo.description: The handle or DID of the repo (aka, current account).

collection.description: The NSID of the record collection.

validate.description: Can be set to 'false' to skip Lexicon schema validation of record data, 'true' to require it, or leave unset to validate only for known Lexicons.

uri.description: The habitat-uri of the put-ed object.

post.description: Upload a new blob, to be referenced from a repository record. The blob will be deleted if it is not referenced within a time window (eg, minutes). Blob restrictions (mimetype, size, etc) are enforced when the reference is created. Requires auth, implemented by PDS.

network.habitat.clique.description: This collection is reserved for special purposes and cannot be directly written to. To read/set cliques, use clique-specific XRPC APIs.

name.description: The name of the document, derived from the first heading.

blob.description: Base64-encoded Yjs state update representing the document content.

editorClique.description: URI of the clique whose members may edit this document.

network.habitat.grantee.clique.description: A clique grantee in the form clique:did:plc:web:arushi/clique-key

lastUsed.description: The last time habitat detected a session with this app.

logoUri.description: The logo URI of this app.

grantee.description: The grantee of the permission — either a DID or a habitat clique URI.

collection.description: The NSID of the collection the permission applies to.

rkey.description: The record key the permission applies to. Empty string means the permission covers the entire collection.

effect.description: Whether this permission grants or denies access.

targetLexicon.description: The NSID of the lexicon this render schema applies to.

title.description: Human-readable name for this record type.

description.description: A brief description of what this record type represents.

network.habitat.render.schema.fieldSchem.description: Describes how to display a single field of a record.

path.description: Dot-notation path into the record value (e.g. 'name', 'startsAt').

optional.description: If true, omit this field from display when its value is missing or empty.

network.habitat.render.schema.datetime.description: Render as a formatted date/time string.

network.habitat.render.schema.badge.description: Render as a pill badge, extracting the token name from an NSID#token value.

network.habitat.render.schema.list.description: Render as a list of items.

network.habitat.render.schema.primary.description: Most prominent display — used for the record's main identifier (e.g. title).

network.habitat.render.schema.metadata.description: De-emphasized display, shown at the bottom or collapsed.

lastTouched.description: The last time a record in this collection was touched.

uri.description: URI reference to the record, formatted as a habitat-uri.
